message:
fix(palette): use key.Matches for quit binding in edit phase instead of raw KeyCtrlC

The edit phase quit handler was checking msg.Type == tea.KeyCtrlC
directly, which bypassed the keybinding system and would not respect
user-configured quit key overrides. Switch to key.Matches(msg,
keys.Quit) for consistency with the rest of the palette key handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -998,7 +998,7 @@ func (m *Model) updateEditPhase(msg tea.KeyMsg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
 		m.phase = PhaseTarget
 		return *m, nil
 
-	case msg.Type == tea.KeyCtrlC:
+	case key.Matches(msg, keys.Quit):
 		m.quitting = true
 		return *m, tea.Quit
 	}
